title: End-to-end verification + real-device matrix

wiring_map_coverage_test green (27 rows, all providers resolve)

Manual device matrix on Android Pixel/Samsung + iOS 17+ (items #10-17 of plan Phase 16 checklist)
PIN Argon2id hash primitive (currently crypt SHA-512 + 500K rounds + per-PIN salt — strong interim, D-SEC-10 mandates Argon2id which needs native binding)

next_action: Verification team delivered 8 audit reports at docs/verification/*.json. All Block-severity bugs fixed (15 items + PIN-clear bug found during coverage push). Rewrite is ship-ready for pre-alpha; beta requires (a) device matrix, (b) 99% coverage across services+features, (c) Argon2id native primitive, (d) deferred UI work.
notes: Verification team (8 parallel read-only audits) + fixer agent (15 Block bugs) + 4 parallel coverage agents + PM-level PIN-clear bug fix. Total tests 886 → 1486 (+600). SettingsController PIN-clear bug was latent — coverage push surfaced it. 2 iterations of fix within this phase.
